---
name: Improvement or new content proposal
about: Suggest a new red flag, anti-pattern, playbook, script, reference, or improvement to existing content.
title: "[proposal] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## What you propose

One paragraph. New red flag? New playbook? New anti-pattern example? Improvement to an existing file?

## Why it belongs in this skill

Reference the principle this addresses, the canonical source it draws from, and which existing section it complements or replaces.

## Where it should live

Map to the existing structure:

- New row in the Red Flag Detection Catalog? (RF-XX, with restart action)
- New file under `anti-patterns/`?
- New file under `playbooks/`?
- New file under `scripts/`?
- New reference digest under `references/`?
- New cognitive move in MINDSET.md or SECURITY.md?
- Modification to SKILL.md?

## Canonical citation (required)

This skill is grounded in cited literature. Proposals without a defensible source citation will be deferred. If your proposal cites a book, name title + chapter; if a public talk/article, link it; if community practice, name 2+ examples.

## Optional draft

If you've already drafted the content, link a fork or paste it here.
